title: anthemis tenuisecta subsp. jahandiezii
intro: Anthemis tenuisecta subsp. jahandiezii is a lesser-known subspecies of the Anthemis genus, commonly referred to as a type of chamomile. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and soothing irritated skin. The health benefits of Anthemis tenuisecta subsp. jahandiezii include its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Anthemis tenuisecta subsp. jahandiezii is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
